name: sbcl-agent-ux
description: An environment based agentic first development enviornment
author: Paul Bernard

scripts.build:app: npm run build && env SBCL_AGENT_ADAPTER=live SBCL_AGENT_TRANSPORT=pipe electron-builder --mac dir
scripts.test:unit:renderer: mkdir -p test-results && SBCL_AGENT_ADAPTER=mock vitest run --project renderer-unit --project renderer-component --reporter=json --outputFile=test-results/renderer-unit.json
scripts.test:integration:adapter: mkdir -p test-results && SBCL_AGENT_ADAPTER=mock vitest run --project adapter-integration --reporter=json --outputFile=test-results/adapter-integration.json
scripts.test:qa: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:coverage:check && npm run test:compliance && npm run test:security && npm run test:performance && npm run test:report && npm run test:index
scripts.test:qa:full: npm run test:qa && npm run test:journey:full && npm run test:ui:report && npm run test:index
scripts.test:journey:full: npm run test:journey && npm run test:journey:sdlc && npm run test:journey:shell && npm run test:journey:live-governance
scripts.test:journey:sdlc: npm run test:spec-drift && npm run build && playwright test tests/ui/electron-sdlc-journey.spec.ts
scripts.test:journey:shell: npm run test:spec-drift && npm run build && playwright test tests/ui/electron-live.spec.ts -g "collapses shell side rails and changes their outer widths|resizes shell side columns through the splitters|restores shell collapse and resize controls after collapsing and re-expanding both side columns|preserves shell collapse and resize behavior after a relaunch with persisted desktop preferences|preserves active docked rail panels after a relaunch with persisted desktop preferences|undocks and redocks shell rail panels through the live desktop shell|drags shell rail panels into the floating desktop stage and docks them back into their rails|preserves reordered shell rail tabs after a relaunch with persisted desktop preferences|preserves undocked shell panels after a relaunch with persisted desktop preferences|round-trips shell preference booleans through the live desktop bridge"
scripts.test:journey:live-governance: npm run test:spec-drift && npm run build && playwright test tests/ui/electron-live.spec.ts -g "authors governed early project artifacts through the conversation chat interface|augments governed early project artifacts through the conversation chat interface|revises governed project foundations through the conversation chat interface|revises governed project architecture through the conversation chat interface|revises governed testing posture through the conversation chat interface|revises governed release readiness through the conversation chat interface|revises governed readiness obligations through the conversation chat interface|denies governed release readiness revisions through the conversation chat interface without persisting them|denies governed project foundation revisions through the conversation chat interface without persisting them|auto-creates corrective governed work from a live runtime event and routes it through approval|reopens corrective governed work from later live runtime events after the earlier correction is no longer actionable|creates a new live editor buffer and preserves it through the buffers view|sends the live editor draft into the listener workspace|opens the live editor draft in the conversation repl workspace|opens the save-as dialog from the live editor surface|opens the load-source dialog from the live editor surface"
scripts.test:journey:dashboard: npm run test:spec-drift && npm run build && SBCL_AGENT_ADAPTER=mock playwright test -g dashboard
scripts.test:journey:conversation: npm run test:spec-drift && npm run build && SBCL_AGENT_ADAPTER=mock playwright test -g "conversation|transcript|composer"
scripts.test:journey:browser: npm run test:spec-drift && npm run build && SBCL_AGENT_ADAPTER=mock playwright test -g "browser|listener|inspected package|inspected symbols|system type"
scripts.test:ui: npm run test:spec-drift && npm run build && SBCL_AGENT_ADAPTER=mock playwright test
scripts.test:ui:headed: npm run test:spec-drift && npm run build && SBCL_AGENT_ADAPTER=mock playwright test --headed
